turns.user_message: I tried to listen to some upbeat music to shake this off, but it didn't do anything for me. I just felt the same flatness afterward.
I keep trying little things to feel something, but it's like my emotions are just stuck. Nothing I do seems to make a dent in this feeling.
I'm starting to think I should talk to someone, because nothing I try works anymore. I just feel completely empty no matter what.

generation_metadata.diversity_anchor: The speaker opens with a failed attempt to feel better.
